content.verdict: The Andaz Maui at Wailea is a stylish, contemporary alternative to the classic luxury resorts on the south shore, blending a chic design aesthetic with genuinely relaxed Hawaiian hospitality. Its five interconnected lagoon pools and direct Mokapu Beach access make it a photographer's dream for honeymooners who want gorgeous backdrops without stiff formality. It's an excellent choice for couples who appreciate modern design, local art, and a complimentary minibar stocked with local snacks.
content.best_room: Book an Oceanfront Suite for the sweeping ocean panoramas from the wraparound lanai and the deep soaking tub positioned to face the Pacific. The suites include a separate living area and the Andaz's signature complimentary minibar replenished daily — a thoughtful touch that makes spontaneous in-room toasts easy. Corner suites on the upper floors offer the best combination of ocean and Wailea views.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Mokapu Beach
itinerary_7_nights.description: Check in through the Andaz's relaxed, desk-free arrival experience and head straight to Mokapu Beach, one of the most uncrowded stretches of sand in Wailea. Settle into the hotel's signature blue-and-white beach chairs, and as the sun drops order cocktails from the beach attendant before heading to Ka'ana Kitchen for a farm-to-table welcome dinner.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Pool-Hopping & Local Art
itinerary_7_nights.description: Spend the morning exploring the five signature pools — each has its own character, from the quiet reflection pool near the spa to the lively main lagoon with swim-up bar. The hotel's curated local art collection throughout the property is worth a slow walk; pick up the self-guided art map at the front desk and discover works by Maui artists together.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Awili Spa & Wellness
itinerary_7_nights.description: Book the Andaz Signature Couples Journey at Awili Spa & Salon — a 90-minute experience incorporating warm pohaku (lava stones), Hawaiian botanical oils, and lomilomi-inspired massage techniques. Afterward, join the complimentary morning yoga class on the lawn overlooking the ocean.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Whale Watching or Snorkel Cruise
itinerary_7_nights.description: From November through April, the waters off Wailea are prime humpback whale territory — book a sunrise whale watching cruise through the concierge for an unforgettable start to the day. Off-season, a snorkel cruise to Molokini Crater is equally spectacular; the hotel partners with top-rated operators for curated experiences.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Upcountry Maui Exploration
itinerary_7_nights.description: Rent a car and drive upcountry to Ali'i Kula Lavender Farm for a romantic morning walk through fragrant rows of purple lavender with panoramic island views. Continue to Makawao town for lunch and boutique shopping, then wind back through pineapple fields as the late afternoon light turns golden.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Dining Experience
itinerary_7_nights.description: Arrange a private in-room dining setup on your lanai through the hotel's romance department — the team will set a candlelit table with florals and a custom menu. Spend the day lazily at the beach and pool, then enjoy the intimate dinner as the stars emerge over the darkened Pacific.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell Morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Take advantage of the complimentary minibar for a sunrise in-room breakfast, watching early light turn the ocean gold from your lanai. Squeeze in one final swim at Mokapu Beach before a leisurely check-out, and let the front desk arrange a local flower lei send-off for your journey home.

caveats: The Andaz attracts a younger, design-conscious crowd alongside families, so the pool areas can be social and animated — couples seeking pure tranquility may prefer the quieter pools near the spa wing.
The beach, while beautiful, is smaller and less sheltered than Wailea Beach at neighboring resorts — swell can make swimming rough on occasional days.
Ka'ana Kitchen's communal-style breakfast can feel impersonal for a honeymoon; request a private lanai table when making reservations.

faqs.question: Is the Andaz Maui good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — the Andaz Maui delivers a stylish, modern luxury experience at a slightly lower price point than the Four Seasons next door, making it an excellent honeymoon choice for couples who want five-star amenities with a more relaxed, contemporary vibe. The romance packages include champagne, rose petal turndown, and priority spa bookings.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: April through June and September through November offer the best weather, fewest crowds, and most competitive pricing. If whale watching is a priority, plan your visit between December and April when humpback whales migrate to Maui's warm waters — seeing them breach from your lanai or the beach is an unforgettable honeymoon moment.

faqs.question: How are the pools at the Andaz Maui?
faqs.answer: The five interconnected infinity pools are genuinely one of the highlights of the property — they cascade down the hillside toward the ocean in a stunning visual sequence. The main pool has a swim-up bar and social atmosphere, while the pools closer to the spa are quieter and more intimate. Honeymooners should explore all five and stake out their favorite early in the morning.

faqs.question: What should we book in advance?
faqs.answer: Awili Spa couples treatments book up weeks in advance — reserve as soon as your room is confirmed. Dinner reservations at Ka'ana Kitchen and Morimoto Maui (the hotel's second restaurant) should also be made before arrival. The concierge can arrange whale watching, snorkel cruises, helicopter tours, and private beach setups with advance notice.

faqs.question: Is it adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, the Andaz Maui is family-friendly. Families are most concentrated around the main pool and during school holidays. The quieter pools and the spa area create natural adult retreats, and the beach is generally peaceful even when the pools are busy.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Fly into Kahului Airport (OGG), approximately 25 minutes from the resort by car. The hotel can arrange private luxury car transfers. Renting a car is highly recommended for exploring Maui — the Road to Hana, Haleakala, and upcountry excursions are all within easy reach.

content.email_template:

Dear Andaz Maui team,

My partner and I are planning our honeymoon and are very interested in staying with you from [DATE] to [DATE] ([X] nights).

We are particularly interested in: an Oceanfront Suite with lanai on an upper floor.

Could you please let us know:
- Current availability for our dates
- Any honeymoon packages or complimentary upgrades available

Thank you for your time.

[Your names]
